claim_status: No-claim sandbox probe contract only; no packaged probe execution, no effective platform policy, no owner-reviewed sandbox readiness, no renderer-security, no site-isolation, no hostile-browsing safety, no SEC-GATE evidence, no production-safety, and no implementation claim.

operations.name: assigned output write control
operations.enforcement_required: explicit grant
operations.safe_target: probe-owned temporary output file

operations.name: assigned input read control
operations.enforcement_required: explicit grant
operations.safe_target: probe-owned read-only fixture file

operations.name: monotonic clock read control
operations.enforcement_required: platform baseline
operations.safe_target: monotonic clock API

operations.name: arbitrary filesystem read
operations.enforcement_required: operating system boundary or broker policy
operations.safe_target: probe-created sibling directory outside assigned root

operations.name: arbitrary filesystem write
operations.enforcement_required: operating system boundary or broker policy
operations.safe_target: probe-created sibling directory outside assigned root

operations.name: untrusted dynamic library load
operations.enforcement_required: library validation, dynamic-code policy, or loader boundary
operations.safe_target: inert unsigned or non-loadable probe library fixture

operations.name: outbound network connect
operations.enforcement_required: network namespace, AppContainer, seatbelt, seccomp, or broker boundary
operations.safe_target: loopback-only fixture listener with no external traffic

operations.name: network listen
operations.enforcement_required: network namespace, AppContainer, seatbelt, seccomp, or broker boundary
operations.safe_target: loopback ephemeral port

operations.name: raw socket create
operations.enforcement_required: operating system privilege boundary
operations.safe_target: socket creation only; no transmitted traffic

operations.name: child process create
operations.enforcement_required: process launch restriction, job, token, namespace, or broker boundary
operations.safe_target: inert probe child binary

operations.name: debug attach
operations.enforcement_required: ptrace, task-port, process-access, or debug-privilege boundary
operations.safe_target: probe-owned sibling process fixture

operations.name: cross-process memory read
operations.enforcement_required: process-access, ptrace, task-port, or memory-read boundary
operations.safe_target: probe-owned sibling process with inert sentinel bytes

operations.name: credential store access
operations.enforcement_required: keychain, credential-manager, secret-service, or broker boundary
operations.safe_target: empty fake credential namespace

operations.name: global clipboard read
operations.enforcement_required: platform clipboard, window-server, or broker boundary
operations.safe_target: isolated test clipboard sentinel when available

operations.name: device open
operations.enforcement_required: device permission, namespace, entitlement, token, or broker boundary
operations.safe_target: harmless fake device node, unavailable dummy path, or denied platform handle

operations.name: ambient platform IPC
operations.enforcement_required: Mach, COM/RPC, D-Bus, named-pipe, namespace, or broker boundary
operations.safe_target: local denied service endpoint fixture

operations.name: registry or preference write
operations.enforcement_required: registry virtualization, preference domain, entitlement, token, or broker boundary
operations.safe_target: dedicated probe-only key or preference domain

operations.name: unexpected inherited handle
operations.enforcement_required: close-on-exec, handle allowlist, job, token, or launcher boundary
operations.safe_target: probe-owned sentinel descriptor or handle intentionally withheld

operations.name: secret environment variable
operations.enforcement_required: launcher environment allowlist
operations.safe_target: synthetic non-secret sentinel variable

operations.name: unsafe working directory
operations.enforcement_required: launcher working-directory policy
operations.safe_target: probe-created directory outside assigned profile root

operations.name: broker disconnect
operations.enforcement_required: parent-death, broker liveness, channel revocation, or fatal policy boundary
operations.safe_target: probe-owned broker fixture
